pilot_tasks.name: Pilot H-SF1-L4: Layer 4 Sensitivity Floor Quadrant Test
key_metrics: UAS mean and std at layer 4
risks: Layer 4 features may not generalize to other layers
50 features may be insufficient for quadratic fit

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot H-Q4-PARADOX: Q4 Paradox Mechanism Investigation
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Q4 specificity differs from Q1 specificity (p < 0.05)
key_metrics: Decoder cosine similarity to neighbors: Q4 vs Q1
Specificity scores: Q4 vs Q1 vs Q3
risks: Specificity metric may not capture the right concept

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot H-STEER: Steering Protocol Debug
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: At least 1 feature shows steering effect != 0 at any beta
key_metrics: Steering effect per feature at beta 5, 10, 20
risks: Steering effects may be too small to detect

pilot_go_criteria.pilot_layer4_sf1_quadrants: Q2+Q4 < 10% AND a > 0 - confirms Sensitivity Floor at layer 4
pilot_go_criteria.pilot_q4_paradox_investigation: Q4 specificity differs from Q1 - explains why absorbed features can be sensitive
pilot_go_criteria.pilot_steering_debug: At least 1 steering effect != 0 - fixes broken protocol

phase2_trigger.description: Phase 2 full experiments depend on pilot results
phase2_trigger.if_layer4_sf1_passes: Run full Sensitivity Floor experiments at layer 4
phase2_trigger.if_q4_paradox_resolved: Revise Sensitivity Floor theory to explain Q4 mechanism
phase2_trigger.if_steering_fixed: Test sensitivity-steering correlation with fixed protocol

note: CRITICAL: Layer 4 is the only non-saturated layer (UAS std=0.48 vs layer 8 std=0.0 from iter_010). pilot_layer4_sf1_quadrants is PRIMARY - tests SF at layer 4 with 50 features. pilot_q4_paradox_investigation addresses the critical paradox: Q4 features (10236, 6768) are absorbed but high-sensitivity (0.91, 0.80), contradicting SF mechanism. pilot_steering_debug fixes a broken protocol (all effects=0 in iter_010).
